product_name: Indomie Mi Goreng instant noodles snack packs
one_liner: Dry instant noodle snack eaten as crispy chips without cooking
twist_idea: Premium DTC 'Crispy Ramen Snacks' with gourmet flavors (truffle, sriracha-lime, everything bagel) marketed as a better-for-you alternative to chips

one_liner: Hard candy made with real coffee extract, tastes like actual espresso
twist_idea: Cold brew coffee candy with single-origin beans, marketed to specialty coffee crowd as portable caffeine alternative

one_liner: Super thin crispy wafer layers with chocolate cream filling
twist_idea: Artisan wafer bars with upscale flavors (salted caramel, matcha white chocolate, tahini dark chocolate) in adult-focused packaging

one_liner: Local chocolate bars with cashew pieces, very popular across SEA
twist_idea: Premium nut-chocolate bars highlighting Indonesian cashews as a unique origin story, positioned against fancy US chocolate brands

one_liner: Dried tropical fruit strips (mango, jackfruit, snake fruit) with no added sugar
twist_idea: Exotic dried fruit variety packs targeting health-conscious snackers, emphasizing fruits Americans have never heard of (snake fruit, salak)

one_liner: Potato chips in wild Indonesian flavors like Indomie Mi Goreng, rendang, and sambal
twist_idea: Bold Asian fusion chip flavors for adventurous US snackers - bring flavors like rendang curry and sambal to kettle chips

one_liner: Wafer sticks filled with rich cheese cream, insanely addictive
twist_idea: Savory cheese wafer sticks positioned as sophisticated cheese-board alternative or wine pairing snack for adults

one_liner: Chocolate-covered wafer bar with caramel and rice crisps inside
twist_idea: Better-ingredient version with dark chocolate, organic caramel, puffed quinoa instead of rice - positioned as healthier candy bar

one_liner: Light, crispy crackers made from tapioca and shrimp/fish, fried until puffy
twist_idea: Gourmet puffed crackers in US-friendly flavors (garlic parmesan, spicy buffalo, dill pickle) made from single ingredients like cassava or chickpeas

one_liner: Thin wafer rolled into cigarette-like sticks filled with chocolate cream
twist_idea: Premium wafer rolls with high-cacao chocolate, positioned as elegant dessert accompaniment or coffee pairing

one_liner: Sandwich crackers with sweet coconut cream filling
twist_idea: Gourmet coconut cream cookies with organic coconut, marketed to keto/paleo crowd as low-carb treat

one_liner: Large decorative tins filled with variety of butter cookies and cream biscuits
twist_idea: Curated cookie gift tins with artisan flavors and modern design, marketed as premium hostess gifts

one_liner: Danish-style butter cookies in round tins, very buttery and crisp
twist_idea: Small-batch European butter cookies with American twists (brown butter, sea salt, bourbon vanilla)

one_liner: Herbal drink sachets that provide energy and prevent colds, bitter-sweet taste
twist_idea: Functional herbal energy shots with adaptogens, positioned like Liquid I.V. but with traditional Indonesian herbs

one_liner: Single-serve wafer chocolate bars, super affordable and portable
twist_idea: Better chocolate wafer bars in grab-and-go packaging for gym bags, marketed as pre-workout carb fuel

one_liner: Roasted peanuts with crunchy flour coating in various flavors
twist_idea: Artisan coated nuts with unique flavors (miso-honey, chili-lime, curry) positioned as bar snack or beer pairing

one_liner: Halal gummy candies in shapes and flavors unique to SEA markets
twist_idea: Premium fruit gummies using real fruit juice and exotic tropical flavors (rambutan, mangosteen, lychee)

one_liner: Thin-sliced cassava root fried into crispy chips, lighter than potato chips
twist_idea: Cassava chips positioned as healthier potato chip alternative, emphasizing resistant starch benefits and root vegetable trend

one_liner: Tiny crispy fried noodle sticks seasoned with garlic and spices, addictively crunchy

one_liner: Sweet-savory shredded dried meat (beef/chicken) eaten as snack or topping
